items.title: Exploratory data analysis
items.description: Correlation heatmaps and scatter matrices reveal redundant features, target leakage candidates, and linear relationships before modeling.

items.title: Principal Component Analysis
items.description: PCA on the sample covariance matrix (or SVD of centered data) finds orthogonal directions of maximal variance; eigenvalues rank explained variance per component.

items.title: Multicollinearity in linear models
items.description: High pairwise correlations among predictors inflate coefficient variance and destabilize OLS; correlation/covariance structure guides regularization (ridge) or feature dropping.

items.title: Mahalanobis and Gaussian modeling
items.description: Mahalanobis distance uses inverse covariance to measure how unusual a point is relative to correlated feature geometry; multivariate Gaussians are parameterized by mean and covariance.

items.title: Feature preprocessing decisions
items.description: Standardizing to unit variance converts covariances to correlations; choosing whether to scale before PCA or distance metrics depends on whether raw variance or association structure should dominate.
